positive: A stylish, modern abstract watercolor depiction of a howling wolf silhouette, surrounded by minimalist cosmic nebulae elements. The wolf is centered and powerful, rendered in deep indigo and charcoal gray tones. The background features swirling sapphire blues, teal, and gold leaf accents, suggesting a celestial forest scene. Composition is symmetrical and impactful, suitable for a t-shirt print. Style: highly detailed watercolor, graphic illustration, cosmic grunge. Lighting: high contrast, ethereal glow emanating from the nebulae. View: flat lay, graphic art print.
